name: Salad Bar Ideas at Home (Disney)
recipeInstructions:
Garden Salad
1. Top lettuce with onion slices, diced carrots, and green peppers.
2. Drizzle with any dressing you like.
Greek Salad
1. Tear lettuce onto a platter.
2. Top with cucumber slices, tomato wedges, red onion slices, olives, crumbled feta, and anchovies (if desired).
3. Drizzle with olive oil and red wine vinegar.
Chef's Salad
1. Cut ham, Swiss cheese, and turkey into cubes.
2. Arrange on a platter of lettuce with tomatoes, cucumbers, and hard boiled eggs.
3. Top with creamy Italian dressing.
Quick and Easy Coleslaw
1. Mix shredded cabbage and carrots with mayonnaise, a splash of vinegar, and a pinch of sugar.
Rice Salad
1. Mix cooked white rice with diced carrots, onion, and green pepper.
2. Toss with Italian dressing.
Shrimp and Avocado Salad
1. Tear some butternut lettuce onto a salad plate.
2. Top with slices of avocado and cooked, peeled shrimp.
3. Drizzle with olive oil and finish with a spritz of lemon juice.
Chicken Caesar Salad
1. Toss lettuce with bottled Caesar salad dressing and a handful of Parmesan cheese.
2. Arrange on salad plates with sliced grilled chicken and croutons.
Smiling Salad
1. Arrange a bed of lettuce on a plate.
2. Add two hard-boiled egg eyes, a carrot slice mouth, and a radish nose.
Black Bean Salad
1. Toss canned, drained black beans with diced red pepper, corn, and diced onion.
2. Mix with 2 parts vinegar and 1 part oil and fresh chopped cilantro.
Mushroom, Spinach, and Red Onion Salad
1. Toss fresh spinach with sliced mushrooms, red onion, croutons, and Honey Poppy Seed Dressing (see recipe).
Salade Nicoise
1. Arrange chunks of white tuna, tomato wedges, hard boiled egg slices, olives, steamed green beans, and anchovies on a bed of lettuce.
2. Top with Dijon Vinaigrette dressing (see recipe).
Mesclun Salad Deluxe
1. Buy mesclun salad mix in the produce section.
2. Top with radishes, onion, pepper, grated carrots, and cherry tomatoes.
